description:
In CHANGELOG, the [2.1.0] release's `### Security` subsection currently holds the placeholder line `- _No security advisories in this release._`. Replace ONLY that line in the [2.1.0] section with:

- Fixed CVE-2026-3310: authenticated path traversal in the export endpoint allowed reading arbitrary workspace files. Upgrade immediately.

The identical placeholder also appears under the [2.0.0] and [1.9.0] Security subsections and inside the fenced Release Process template — leave all of those, and the `## Security Policy` section, exactly as they are.
